per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student provided some clear and effective correction commands, but others were vague or lacked coherence.
The student demonstrated a good understanding of sorting and searching concepts, but sometimes applied them incorrectly or incompletely.
The student did not effectively iterate and refine the correction commands based on the AI output, leading to some missed opportunities for improvement.

justification: The student demonstrated a partial understanding of steering concepts, with some effective correction commands and a good grasp of sorting and searching concepts, but was hindered by an inability to effectively iterate and refine their approach.
